title: Grimoire
description: A Fabric server-side mod to enhance item upgrade mechanism.
body:
Grimoire is a Fabric server-side mod to enhance item upgrade mechanism.

**Grimoire is looking for feedback from players and server owners! If there are any suggestions, feel free to report them on GitHub**

**Require: Fabric API**

# Features
- Custom enchantments
- Custom items
- Custom recipes
- Fully server-sided
- Gameplay balanced
- Compatible with popular server-side mods
- LuckPerms support

# Wiki
Link: https://docs.phomc.dev/grimoire/intro
